Pursuant to my partnership agreement, I will receive a final partnership distribution. This payment will be based solely on the firm’s earnings through the date of my withdrawal from the partnership and will be paid before I assume the duties of the position  (2022-09-01)
Pursuant to my partnership agreement with Jones Day, I will receive a refund of my capital account and any accrued interest before I assume the duties of the position. (2022-09-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan.  The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation. (2022-09-01)

Upon withdrawal from my partnership, the firm will withhold an amount for reconciliations and tax payments that the firm makes on behalf of its partners. Any excess amounts withheld by the firm that end up not being used will be refunded to me no later than 5 years after my departure (2022-09-01)

Pursuant to my partnership agreement, I may receive a severance payment at the discretion of the firm’s managing partner for an amount that is not to exceed a specific percentage of my participation from calendar year 2025. If I am awarded this payment, I will receive it before I assume the duties of the position. (2022-09-01)
